data.title: 国际服歌曲「Mint Choco Days」MV公布

data.body:
["Mint Choco Days" Music Video Release]

Sensei, Airi's "Mint Choco Days" music video is out now! I hope you have a sweet and refreshing day, filled with cheerful music!💚
And don't forget - the digital single for "Mint Choco Days" is set to release on 12/16(Mon)!

▶Watch music video: https://youtu.be/fj4hgbPbKN4

#BlueArchive
